title: `JSON_SCHEMA_VALID` returns wrong result for strange schema
key_bug_features: JSON_SCHEMA_VALID returns incorrect validation results for various schemas
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO json_test (id, data) VALUES (1, '{"const": false}');
SELECT JSON_SCHEMA_VALID(data, '{"key": null}') FROM json_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT JSON_SCHEMA_VALID(data, '42') FROM json_test WHERE id = 2;
